string.name: microphone_permission_reason
string.value: Used to record voice commands in the Home Assistant assistant.

string.name: location_permission_reason
string.value: Used to share this device location and update location entities in Home Assistant.

string.name: location_background_permission_reason
string.value: Allows Home Assistant to update device location in the background for home, away, and zone automations.

string.name: activity_motion_permission_reason
string.value: Used to read device motion and operating hand state data and sync it to Home Assistant.

string.name: detect_gesture_permission_reason
string.value: Used to read device holding hand state data and sync it to Home Assistant.

string.name: bluetooth_permission_reason
string.value: Used to read device Bluetooth state data and sync it to Home Assistant.

string.name: background_refresh_permission_reason
string.value: Allows Home Assistant to keep background data in sync after persistent connection is enabled, for refreshing home screen cards.

string.name: light_card_description
string.value: Controls a Home Assistant light entity.

string.name: media_card_description
string.value: Controls a Home Assistant media player entity.

string.name: scene_card_description
string.value: Triggers a Home Assistant scene entity.
